title: S3. AHC024 / Topological Map
label: mx1_execute_01
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S3-ahc024-topological-map
Title: S3. AHC024 / Topological Map

Problem:
Compress a colored city map onto a 50 x 50 grid while preserving all color-adjacency relations and connectivity constraints, and maximize empty space.

Grading target:
E + 1, where E is the number of empty cells.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: N/A
JUSTIFICATION: This is an optimization problem requiring algorithmic implementation.
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: N/A
JUSTIFICATION: This is an optimization problem requiring algorithmic implementation.

run_level_variable_overrides.selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

assessment.summary: This is the first scored attempt in the loop history.

what_helped: The loop preserved the question and family boundary so changes stay interpretable.
The current prompt is isolated as the only variable being optimized.
what_hurt: The run still has room to improve in either correctness or efficiency.

recommendation.reason: The answers are still wrong, so this phase should keep exploring meaningfully different prompt directions.
recommendation.new_prompt_text: Solve the problem directly, keep attention on the core mathematical step, and avoid wandering into side explanations that do not change the final answer.
